# Marbella

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Anclajes](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/anclajes/)
- [Asentamientos](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/asentamientos/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones/)
- [Cimentaciones Superficiales](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/cimentaciones-superficiales/)
- [Columnas Grava](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/columnas-grava/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/compresion-simple/)
- [Corte Directo](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/corte-directo/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/deep-soil-mixing/)
- [Densidad Cono Arena](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/densidad-cono-arena/)
- [Deslizamientos](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/deslizamientos/)
- [Dilatometro](https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/dilatometro/)

## Contact
- Website: https://marbella.mecanicadesuelos.vip/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
